opening: We don't know each other yet. Four quick questions so the briefing pipeline has something to work with. What we build from these answers becomes the foundation we'll keep referring back to.

questions.prompt: What are we building? One sentence is fine. We'll deepen it later.
Who are we building this for? Be specific if you can. "Solo SaaS founders" beats "developers."
questions.ack_template: Building for **{shortened}**. That frames a lot of what comes next.

questions.prompt: What does done look like in 30 days for us? The demo, the milestone, the launch. Whatever's on your calendar.
questions.ack_template: 30 days to **{shortened}**. We'll watch the gap between current state and that target every week.

questions.prompt: What's currently the scariest part? The thing that wakes you up. We'll tag this as a thread we keep checking on.
questions.ack_template: Tagged **{shortened}** as an open thread. We'll keep referencing it until it's resolved.

closing_template: Got it. We're building **{q1_short}** for **{q2_short}**, aiming for **{q3_short}**, watching **{q4_short}**. Let's start there.
